description: Composition:100% polo t-shirt in white with black stripesWash care:Machine wash separately in cold water. Use mild detergent. Do not bleach. Avoid soaking. Line dry inside out in shade. Warm iron only. Do not iron directly on print/embroidery.Fitting:Regular FitThis white with thin black stripes t-shirt from classic polo is a new take on the traditional polo design. An ideal combination of colours, this tee makes it the perfect wear to clubs, when golfing and on outings. Team it up with casuals and make heads turn.Model statistics:1. The model wears size M in t-shirts2. Height-5.11", Shoulders-18"
